title: ononis arvensis f. subrepens
intro: Ononis arvensis f. subrepens, also known as creeping restharrow, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of creeping restharrow include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Creeping restharrow is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
